nodes.name: Fetch + parse all year CSVs (BPD only)

parameters.query:
-- Uses production.parse_money() and production.canonicalize_name() helpers.

-- 1) Insert any new BPD officers from earnings that don't already exist in the id map
INSERT INTO production.v2_officer_id_map (first_name, last_name, canonical_name)
SELECT DISTINCT ON (canon)
  TRIM(SPLIT_PART(name, ',', 2)) AS first_name,
  TRIM(SPLIT_PART(name, ',', 1)) AS last_name,
  canon
FROM (
  SELECT name, production.canonicalize_name(name) AS canon
  FROM production.raw_v2_boston_earnings
  WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name <> ''
) src
WHERE canon IS NOT NULL
  AND canon NOT IN (
    SELECT canonical_name FROM production.v2_officer_id_map WHERE canonical_name IS NOT NULL
  );

-- 2) Replace canonical earnings for source = 'boston_open_data'
DELETE FROM production.v2_earnings_year WHERE source = 'boston_open_data';

INSERT INTO production.v2_earnings_year
  (bpi_id, year, department_name, title,
   regular_pay, retro_pay, other_pay, ot_pay, injured_pay, detail_pay, quinn_pay, total_pay,
   source, as_of)
SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.bpi_id, r.year)
  m.bpi_id, r.year, r.department_name, r.title,
  production.parse_money(r.regular),
  production.parse_money(r.retro),
  production.parse_money(r.other),
  production.parse_money(r.overtime),
  production.parse_money(r.injured),
  production.parse_money(r.detail),
  production.parse_money(r.quinn),
  production.parse_money(r.total_earnings),
  'boston_open_data', now()
FROM production.raw_v2_boston_earnings r
JOIN production.v2_officer_id_map m
  ON m.canonical_name = production.canonicalize_name(r.name)
WHERE r.name IS NOT NULL AND r.name <> '' AND r.year IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY m.bpi_id, r.year,
         (m.employee_id IS NOT NULL) DESC,
         (m.mptc_id IS NOT NULL) DESC,
         m.created_at;

-- 3) Log run
INSERT INTO production.v2_ingest_run (pipeline_name, started_at, finished_at, status, rows_in, rows_out)
VALUES (
  'bpi_ingest_boston_earnings',
  now(), now(), 'success',
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM production.raw_v2_boston_earnings),
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM production.v2_earnings_year WHERE source = 'boston_open_data')
);

main.node: Fetch + parse all year CSVs (BPD only)
